# DevBench

> DevBench is a free, open-source collection of 143+ browser-based developer tools — JSON formatters, encoders, PDF utilities, calculators, converters, and more. All processing runs client-side; no account required and no data is uploaded to servers.

Live site: https://www.devbench.co.in

## JSON & Data Tools

- [JSON Formatter & Validator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/json-formatter): Format, validate, and minify JSON with error highlighting and tree view
- [JSON Diff](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/json-diff): Compare two JSON objects with color-coded diff visualization
- [JSON to YAML](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/json-to-yaml): Convert JSON to YAML format instantly
- [YAML to JSON](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/yaml-to-json): Convert YAML to JSON, supports anchors, aliases, multi-document streams
- [YAML Formatter & Validator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/yaml-formatter): Format, validate and auto-fix YAML with error line numbers
- [JSON to CSV](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/json-to-csv): Convert JSON arrays to CSV with automatic header extraction
- [CSV to JSON](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/csv-to-json): Convert CSV to JSON with type inference
- [JSON to TSV](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/json-to-tsv): Convert JSON arrays to tab-separated values for Excel & Sheets
- [TSV to JSON](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/tsv-to-json): Parse tab-separated values into JSON arrays
- [JSON to TypeScript](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/json-to-typescript): Generate TypeScript interfaces from JSON data
- [JSON to XML](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/json-to-xml): Convert JSON to XML format
- [XML to JSON](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/xml-to-json): Convert XML to JSON format
- [TOML to JSON](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/toml-to-json): Convert TOML configuration files to JSON

## Encoding & Decoding

- [Base64 Encode](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/base64-encode): Encode text to Base64 with full UTF-8 support
- [Base64 Decode](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/base64-decode): Decode Base64 strings back to plain text
- [Base64 Image](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/base64-image): Encode images to Base64 data URIs or decode Base64 back to image
- [URL Encode](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/url-encode): URL-encode text with percent-encoding
- [URL Decode](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/url-decode): Decode URL-encoded strings
- [HTML Entity Encode](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/html-entity-encode): Encode special characters to HTML entities
- [HTML Entity Decode](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/html-entity-decode): Decode HTML entities back to plain text
- [Text to Hex](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/text-to-hex): Convert text to hexadecimal bytes
- [Hex to Text](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/hex-to-text): Convert hex bytes back to text
- [Text to Binary](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/text-to-binary): Convert text to binary representation
- [Binary to Text](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/binary-to-text): Convert binary back to text
- [ROT13](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/rot13): Encode or decode text with ROT13 cipher
- [Morse Code](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/morse-code): Convert text to Morse code and back

## Text Utilities

- [String Inspector](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/string-inspector): Deep-inspect any string — length, bytes, Unicode codepoints, char frequency, entropy
- [Markdown Preview](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/markdown-preview): Live side-by-side Markdown editor and rendered HTML preview with GFM support
- [Regex Tester](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/regex-tester): Test regular expressions with live match highlighting, group capture view, and substitution
- [Case Converter](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/case-converter): Convert text to camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, kebab-case, UPPER CASE, lower case, and more
- [Text Diff](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/text-diff): Compare two texts and highlight differences
- [Word Counter](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/word-counter): Count words, characters, sentences with reading time
- [Slug Generator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/slug-generator): Generate URL-friendly slugs from text
- [Lorem Ipsum](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/lorem-ipsum): Generate placeholder text in paragraphs, sentences, or words
- [Line Sorter](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/line-sorter): Sort, reverse, deduplicate, or shuffle lines
- [Find & Replace](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/find-replace): Find and replace with plain text or regex — works like Word's Ctrl+H
- [Whitespace Normalizer](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/whitespace-normalizer): Trim lines, collapse spaces, remove blank lines
- [String Reverse](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/string-reverse): Reverse any string with full Unicode support
- [Markdown to HTML](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/markdown-to-html): Convert Markdown to HTML with GFM support
- [HTML to Markdown](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/html-to-markdown): Convert HTML back to Markdown
- [HTML to Plain Text](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/html-to-text): Strip all HTML tags and return plain text
- [Strip Markdown](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/strip-markdown): Remove all Markdown and text formatting, return plain text
- [Unicode Checker](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/unicode-checker): Inspect every character: codepoint, name, category, script, UTF-8 bytes, HTML entity

## Developer Tools

- [JWT Debugger](https://www.devbench.co.in/jwt-debugger): Decode and verify JSON Web Tokens
- [API Tester](https://www.devbench.co.in/api-tester): Test REST APIs directly in the browser
- [Webhook Simulator](https://www.devbench.co.in/webhook-simulator): Generate, send, and verify signed webhook payloads — GitHub, Stripe, Slack, Shopify, or generic HMAC
- [AWS Lambda Sandbox](https://www.devbench.co.in/lambda-sandbox): Run Node.js Lambda handlers against API Gateway, SQS, S3, EventBridge events — sandboxed in browser
- [WebSocket Tester](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/websocket-tester): Open a WebSocket to any ws:// or wss:// endpoint, send messages, watch frames in real time
- [Code Playground](https://www.devbench.co.in/playground): Multi-language code playground — JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Go, Jupyter-style notebooks
- [Mermaid Diagram Editor](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/mermaid-editor): Live editor for Mermaid.js flowcharts, sequence diagrams, ER diagrams, Gantt charts
- [AES-256-GCM Encryptor](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/aes-encrypt-decrypt): Encrypt and decrypt text with AES-256-GCM — password-based, client-side only
- [Hash Generator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/hash-generator): Generate SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512 hashes
- [UUID / ULID / Nano ID](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/uuid-generator): Generate UUID v4, ULID, or Nano ID values
- [HTML to JSX](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/html-to-jsx): Convert HTML to React JSX — class→className, self-closing void elements, camelCase events
- [HTML Preview](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/html-preview): Live-render HTML in a sandboxed iframe with optional JavaScript execution
- [Color Converter](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/color-converter): Convert HEX, RGB, HSL, HSV colors with preview
- [Unix Timestamp](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/unix-timestamp): Convert Unix timestamps to dates and back
- [Cron Parser](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/cron-parser): Parse cron expressions with plain-English description
- [Cron Editor](https://www.devbench.co.in/cron-editor): Visual cron expression builder and editor
- [Password Generator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/password-generator): Generate secure random passwords
- [QR Code Generator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/qr-code): Generate QR codes from text or URLs
- [URL Parser](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/url-parser): Parse URLs into protocol, host, path, query, and hash components
- [Base Converter](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/base-converter): Convert between decimal, hex, binary, octal
- [CSS Minifier](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/css-minifier): Minify and compress CSS
- [HTML Minifier](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/html-minifier): Minify and compress HTML
- [SQL Formatter](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/sql-formatter): Format and pretty-print SQL queries
- [cURL to Fetch](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/curl-to-fetch): Convert cURL commands to JavaScript fetch()
- [cURL Formatter](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/curl-formatter): Normalize messy cURL into clean, copy-pasteable commands
- [String Escape](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/string-escape): Escape strings for JSON, JS, SQL, Regex
- [MIME Type Lookup](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/mime-lookup): Look up MIME types by file extension
- [SemVer Comparator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/semver-compare): Compare npm-style semantic versions
- [chmod Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/chmod-calculator): Convert Unix permission octals ↔ symbolic notation
- [.env Parser](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/dotenv-parser): Parse .env files to JSON and flag duplicate keys
- [Log Line Parser](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/log-parser): Turn plain-text logs into structured JSON
- [Contrast Checker (WCAG)](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/contrast-checker): Foreground & background — WCAG contrast ratio for accessibility
- [CSS Gradient Generator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/gradient-generator): Linear gradient preview and CSS snippet
- [HTTP Status Reference](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/http-status-reference): Reference guide for HTTP status codes
- [CSS Box Shadow](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/css-box-shadow): Interactive CSS box-shadow generator

## Date & Time Tools

- [Epoch Converter](https://www.devbench.co.in/epoch): Convert between Unix epoch timestamps and human-readable dates
- [Timezone Converter](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/timezone-converter): Convert a moment across 600+ IANA time zones with DST handling and shareable links
- [Age Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/age-calculator): Calculate exact age from a birth date
- [Days Between Dates](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/days-between-dates): Calculate the number of days between two dates
- [Date Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/date-calculator): Add or subtract days, weeks, months from a date
- [Countdown Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/countdown-calculator): Time remaining until a target date
- [ISO Week Number](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/week-number-calculator): Get the ISO week number and year for any date
- [Due Date Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/due-date-calculator): Estimate pregnancy due date from last menstrual period

## PDF Tools

- [Merge PDF](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/merge-pdf): Combine multiple PDF files into one
- [Split PDF](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/split-pdf): Split a PDF into individual pages or page ranges
- [Compress PDF](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/compress-pdf): Reduce PDF file size
- [Rotate PDF](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/rotate-pdf): Rotate PDF pages
- [PDF Page Numbers](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/pdf-page-numbers): Add page numbers to a PDF
- [PDF Page Editor](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/pdf-page-editor): Reorder or delete PDF pages
- [Watermark PDF](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/watermark-pdf): Add a text or image watermark to a PDF
- [Image to PDF](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/image-to-pdf): Convert images to a PDF document
- [Text to PDF](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/text-to-pdf): Convert plain text to PDF
- [HTML to PDF](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/html-to-pdf): Convert HTML to PDF
- [Jupyter to PDF](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/ipynb-to-pdf): Convert Jupyter notebooks (.ipynb) to PDF
- [PDF to JPG](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/pdf-to-jpg): Export PDF pages as JPEG images
- [PDF Compare](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/pdf-compare): Compare two PDF documents side by side

## Image Tools

- [Background Remover](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/background-remover): Remove image backgrounds in the browser
- [Image Resizer](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/image-resizer): Resize images to specific dimensions
- [Image Merger](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/image-merger): Combine multiple images side by side, stacked, or in a grid
- [Image Compressor](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/image-compressor): Compress images to reduce file size
- [Image Format Converter](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/image-format-converter): Convert HEIC, SVG, PNG, JPG, WebP to PNG, JPEG, WebP, or SVG (bitmap tracing)
- [SVG Optimizer](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/svg-optimizer): Optimize and minify SVG files
- [EXIF Viewer](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/exif-viewer): Inspect EXIF metadata from image files

## Conversion Tools

- [Temperature Converter](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/temperature-converter): Convert between Celsius, Fahrenheit, and Kelvin — includes common reference temperatures
- [Currency Converter](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/currency-converter): Live exchange rates from ECB — convert any currency pair
- [Byte Converter](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/byte-converter): Convert between bytes, KB, MB, GB, TB — SI and binary IEC modes
- [Unit Converter](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/unit-converter): Convert length, weight, area, volume, and speed — metric and imperial
- [Number to Words](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/number-to-words): Convert numbers to English words — supports Indian lakh/crore system and currency format
- [Roman Numerals](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/roman-numerals): Convert between Roman numerals and decimal numbers
- [Duration Converter](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/duration-converter): Convert seconds to HH:MM:SS and break down into days, hours, minutes
- [Percentage Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/percentage-calc): Calculate X% of Y, X as % of Y, and % change from A to B
- [Aspect Ratio Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/aspect-ratio): Find missing width or height from an aspect ratio
- [World Clock](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/world-clock): Current time in major cities worldwide with DST support

## Finance Calculators

- [Discount Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/discount-calculator): Calculate sale price and savings from original price and discount percentage
- [GST / VAT Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/gst-calculator): Add or remove GST/VAT — supports Indian GST brackets 5%, 12%, 18%, 28%
- [Tip Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/tip-calculator): Calculate tip amount and split bill between multiple people
- [Simple Interest Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/simple-interest): Calculate simple interest using I = P × R × T
- [Compound Interest Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/compound-interest): Calculate future value with monthly, quarterly, or annual compounding
- [Loan EMI Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/loan-emi-calculator): Monthly loan installment, total interest payable, and amortization summary
- [ROI Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/roi-calculator): Calculate return on investment percentage and net profit
- [Profit & Loss Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/profit-loss-calculator): Calculate profit, gross margin, and markup
- [Salary Hike Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/salary-hike-calculator): Calculate raise percentage and monthly salary difference

## Math Tools

- [Graph Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/graph-calculator): Plot and visualize mathematical functions with zoom, pan, and intersection detection
- [Quadratic Solver](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/quadratic-solver): Find roots of ax²+bx+c=0 (real or complex) with step-by-step working
- [Pythagorean Theorem](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/pythagorean-theorem): Find the missing side of a right triangle — hypotenuse or leg
- [GCD & LCM Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/gcd-lcm-calculator): Greatest common divisor and least common multiple with Euclidean algorithm steps

## Health Calculators

- [BMI Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/bmi-calculator): Calculate Body Mass Index with WHO categories
- [Water Intake Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/water-intake-calculator): Estimate daily fluid needs from weight and exercise
- [Body Fat Estimator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/body-fat-calculator): Estimate body fat percentage from BMI, age, and sex
- [BMR Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/bmr-calculator): Basal Metabolic Rate using Mifflin-St Jeor equation
- [TDEE Calculator](https://www.devbench.co.in/tools/calorie-calculator): Total Daily Energy Expenditure from BMR and activity level

## Reference

- [Linux Cheatsheet](https://www.devbench.co.in/linux-cheatsheet): Quick reference for common Linux commands — searchable, with copy-ready examples
- [Astronomy Tools](https://www.devbench.co.in/astronomy): Sunrise, sunset, moon phase, and space utilities
- [Blog](https://www.devbench.co.in/blog): Articles and guides on developer tools and workflows
- [About](https://www.devbench.co.in/about): About DevBench
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.devbench.co.in/privacy): How DevBench handles (or rather, doesn't handle) your data
